directions_text: The Faculty of Mining and Minerals Technology (FMMT) is based on the Tarkwa Campus. Start at the faculty office or central reception for directions to individual departments.
The Faculty of Geosciences and Environmental Studies (FGES) is based on the Tarkwa Campus. Start at the faculty office or central reception for directions to individual departments.
The Faculty of Engineering (FoE) is based on the Tarkwa Campus. Start at the faculty office or central reception for directions to individual departments.
The School of Railways and Infrastructure Development (SRID) is based on the Essikado Campus. Start at the faculty office or central reception for directions to individual departments.
The Faculty of Integrated Management Science (FIMS) is based on the Tarkwa Campus. Start at the faculty office or central reception for directions to individual departments.
The Faculty of Computing and Mathematical Sciences (FCaMS) is based on the Tarkwa Campus. Start at the faculty office or central reception for directions to individual departments.
The School of Petroleum Studies (SPeTs) is based on the Tarkwa Campus. Start at the faculty office or central reception for directions to individual departments.
